channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Law firm Fenwick & West sued for $525M over alleged role in FTX collapse
item.description: Twenty FTX victims are suing Fenwick & West, claiming the law firm didn’t just represent FTX, it helped build the infrastructure that kept the fraud running.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: JPMorgan lifts Bitcoin ETF exposure in Q1, led by BlackRock’s IBIT
item.description: The bank raised its reported IBIT holdings by 174% in the first quarter while also adding exposure to select Bitcoin, Ether and Solana-linked funds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Altcoin season ‘quietly’ starting? Analysts spot three bullish indicators
item.description: Crypto analysts spot early altcoin recovery signals as key metrics improve and capital rotation hints at a potential altseason in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: CFTC no-action letter eases event contract reporting rules
item.description: The CFTC issued no-action relief from certain swap reporting rules for fully collateralized event contracts as prediction market disputes widen.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bank of England reconsiders strict stablecoin regime
item.description: BoE weighs easing UK stablecoin caps and reserve demands after industry backlash, in a move that could decide whether GBP tokens can compete with dollar‑pegged rivals.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: BitGo posts wider Q1 loss despite revenue more than doubling
item.description: BitGo’s headline revenue figure doubled year-over-year to $3.8 billion, but a Bitcoin price decline and IPO-related costs pushed net losses to $60.7 million in the first quarter.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Trump’s White House weighs 250 pardons to celebrate America's 250th birthday
item.description: One of the developers behind the crypto-mixing protocol Samourai Wallet has publicly expressed hopes for a pardon, along with FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: NY judge pushes back hearing for Aave’s bid to unfreeze $71M in ETH
item.description: A New York judge has ordered supplemental briefings because Aave did not adequately outline how compounding losses could occur if the restraining notice remains in place.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brian Quarmby

item.title: Bitcoin firm Nakamoto records net loss in Q1 despite sixfold revenue growth
item.description: Nakamoto CEO David Bailey said the company is focused on scaling its Bitcoin treasury, services and trading strategies for the remainder of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Bitcoin risks slump after hitting ‘major bear market resistance’: CryptoQuant
item.description: Bitcoin’s rally may reverse as its price has hit a historic resistance level and traders appear to already be taking profits, said CryptoQuant in a note on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: US banks expect ‘slow, then fast’ shift to digitized finance: Moody's
item.description: Traditional financial institutions are actively preparing for a surge in adoption to avoid being caught flat-footed by a sudden shift in market demand, according to Moody’s.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: AI chatbot Claude helps man recover 5 Bitcoin after finding old seed phrase
item.description: The crypto investor had Claude search through two Macs, two external hard drives, an Apple Notes export, iCloud Mail, Gmail inbox and X messages to help retrieve the Bitcoin.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Only 4% of US voters consider crypto in candidate choice: Poll
item.description: US adults are largely wary of crypto and consider it the least important policy issue when picking who to vote for, according to a poll by Politico.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong gets behind CLARITY Act ahead of Thursday markup
item.description: Armstrong said the bill is "closer than ever" to advancing in the US Congress after months of negotiations between the crypto industry and banks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to lead Federal Reserve
item.description: The US Senate voted largely along party lines to confirm Kevin Warsh to lead the Fed’s Board of Governors, despite many Democrats’ concerns about the central bank’s independence.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Whale shorts $70M in crypto and tech: Should Bitcoin traders worry?
item.description: Despite short-term bearish bets from a successful Hyperliquid whale, a growing US Fed balance sheet and rising inflation support Bitcoin in the long term.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Polymarket's monthly volume declines for first time since August
item.description: Prediction markets trading volume had been tracking monthly gains as the sector gains popularity among short-term traders, but competition is also increasing.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Bitcoin traders expect ‘fast move’ to $90K following CLARITY Act vote
item.description: Bitcoin traders eye a possible move higher as short-term selling pressure fades and the CLARITY Act vote boosts crypto market focus.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Price predictions 5/13: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
item.description: Bitcoin’s pullback is expected to find support near $79,000, but every recovery attempt is likely to be sold into.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Rakesh Upadhyay

item.title: Societe Generale deploys stablecoins on Canton for tokenized finance
item.description: France's SocGen plans to use its EURCV and USDCV stablecoins for tokenized collateral, repo financing and institutional settlement activity on the Canton blockchain network.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: US government asks for $1M forfeiture from ex-Celsius exec ahead of sentencing
item.description: Former Celsius chief revenue officer Roni Cohen-Pavon, scheduled to be sentenced on Thursday after a guilty plea, agreed to a judgment of $1 million that he obtained as a result of his crimes.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Fidelity International launches Moody’s-rated tokenized fund on Chainlink
item.description: The Bermuda-based asset manager launched a tokenized liquidity fund using Chainlink and Sygnum infrastructure, with JPMorgan providing daily NAV data for pricing.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Tea Protocol announces June 4 mainnet launch and TGE on Aerodrome to secure open-source development in the AI era
item.description: This quarter, AI started writing its own exploits. Tea is shipping the trust layer underneath it. Code Is Abundant. Trust Is Not.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Traders say Ethereum ready for a 'strong move' after ETH price taps $2.3K
item.description: Market analysts eye fresh Ethereum upside, fueled by JPMorgan and BlackRock tokenized fund moves plus looming CLARITY Act catalyst.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Bitcoin price targets $79K as US PPI inflation hits highest since 2022
item.description: Bitcoin slipped further below the $80,000 mark as US PPI data compounded the inflation problem from the US-Iran war and associated high oil prices.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Brickken and Magma partner to deliver Net Asset Value (NAV) oracle for tokenized real estate
item.description: Built on Magma's Digital Twin Token (DTT) and Brickken's institutional tokenization infrastructure to close the data gap that has held tokenized real estate back.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Paybis secures MiCA, payment licenses in Latvia for EU crypto expansion
item.description: Paybis has secured both a MiCA crypto licence and a PSD2 payment institution licence from Latvia’s central bank, becoming the first company in the country to hold both simultaneously.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Farage faces UK standards probe over $7M gift from crypto billionaire
item.description: UK Reform Party leader Nigel Farage is reportedly facing a probe over an undeclared donation from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne that he received before becoming an MP in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Metaplanet Q1 profit jumps, but Bitcoin losses hit bottom line
item.description: Metaplanet posted strong Q1 operating income driven by Bitcoin options revenue, but swung to a $728 million loss as BTC price declines triggered valuation markdowns.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben
